# TimeTeller

TimeTeller is the machine learning tool that analyses the local
circadian clock as a system. It aims to estimate the circadian clock
phase and the level of dysfunction from a single sample by modelling the
multi-dimensional state of the clock.

## Installation

You can install the development version of TimeTeller from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("VadimVasilyev1994/TimeTeller-v2")
```

## Information

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r
# load the package
library(TimeTeller)

# function help
help(train_model)

# info about data included in the package
help(panda_data)
```

Examples and documentation available at
[TimeTeller](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`TimeTeller-package`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/TimeTeller.md)
  [`TimeTeller`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/TimeTeller.md)
  : TimeTeller: Inferring circadian phase and dysfunction from single
  samples
- [`bjarn_data`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/bjarn_data.md)
  : Bjarnasson microarray data
- [`check_cov_interp()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/check_cov_interp.md)
  : Covariance matrix ellipsoid volume
- [`choose_genes_tt()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/choose_genes_tt.md)
  : Rhythmicity analysis of training data
- [`choose_logthresh()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/choose_logthresh.md)
  : Log Threshold selection
- [`choose_logthresh_plot()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/choose_logthresh_plot.md)
  : Log Threshold selection plot
- [`display_rhythmicity_results()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/display_rhythmicity_results.md)
  : Display the results of cosinor rhythmicity analysis
- [`exprs_vs_PredTime_plot()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/exprs_vs_PredTime_plot.md)
  : Visualise the the estimated temporal expression of test data
- [`geneset_rhythm_info()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/geneset_rhythm_info.md)
  : Rhythmicity analysis of selected geneset
- [`panda_data`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/panda_data.md)
  : Panda data
- [`plotPCs_test()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plotPCs_test.md)
  : Assess precision of time predictions
- [`plot_3d_projection()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_3d_projection.md)
  : Visualise the training model
- [`plot_3d_projection_with_test()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_3d_projection_with_test.md)
  : Visualise the test data
- [`plot_cv_res()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_cv_res.md)
  : Cross-validation results on the training data
- [`plot_deviation_cv_corrected()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_deviation_cv_corrected.md)
  : Cross-validation results on the training data
- [`plot_deviation_cv_original()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_deviation_cv_original.md)
  : Cross-validation results on the training data
- [`plot_genes()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_genes.md)
  : Visualise multiple gene expression
- [`plot_ind_curve()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_ind_curve.md)
  : Theta calculation of individual samples
- [`plot_pc_importance()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_pc_importance.md)
  : Principal component variance
- [`plot_raw_likelis()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_raw_likelis.md)
  : Likelihoods of individual samples
- [`plot_reps()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_reps.md)
  : Visualise gene expression across groups and replicates
- [`plot_var_importance()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/plot_var_importance.md)
  : Principal component loadings
- [`shift_outlier_times()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/shift_outlier_times.md)
  : Shift predicted phases
- [`test_model()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/test_model.md)
  : Project test data on the training model
- [`train_cv()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/train_cv.md)
  : Cross-validate the TimeTeller model
- [`train_model()`](https://vadimvasilyev1994.github.io/TimeTeller/reference/train_model.md)
  : Train the TimeTeller model
